commit.message:
Search Wikipedia API for missing character images at display time

- When a character has no stored image, the card shows a spinning loader
- Fetches from Wikipedia API using 3 fallback queries: '{name} (comics)', '{name} Marvel Comics', '{name}'
- On success: image is shown and cached in localStorage (never re-fetched)
- On failure: clean SVG initials fallback is shown
- Download button always uses the currently displayed image src
- Zero impact on characters that already have images

Replace broken Twitter widget with react-tweet for reliable feed

The Live page's X/Twitter timeline embed consistently failed due to rate
limits, ad blockers, and third-party cookie blocking. Replaced widgets.js
with Vercel's react-tweet package which renders tweets as native React
components — no iframes, no external scripts, not blocked by ad blockers.

commit.message:
feat: visual canvas workflow builder with @xyflow/react

Replace the form-based workflow builder with a full pan/zoom canvas.
Nodes for all 7 step types (trigger, agent_task, approval, condition,
publish, delay, notify) render as styled cards with animated edges.
Clicking a node opens a right-side config panel; the toolbar provides
Add Step, Templates, Run, and Save actions. Run-history chips appear
bottom-left; node overlays show live run status.

- Install @xyflow/react; add React Flow dark-theme CSS overrides
- Extend WorkflowStep with position field and WorkflowNodeType union
- Shell gains canvas prop (overflow-hidden, no padding) for full-bleed layout
- stepsToNodes / stepsToEdges / nodesToSteps conversion utilities
- Three built-in templates: SEO→Blog Post, Product Launch, Promo Email

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix broken images and dramatically speed up dropdown

Image fixes:
- Replaced 543 'image_not_available' Marvel URLs with correct images from superhero API (45 matched by name)
- Remaining 498 with no available image now show SVG initials fallback instantly (no failed HTTP request)

Performance fixes:
- Dropdown now uses DocumentFragment for batch DOM insertion (single reflow instead of 1654)
- Browse mode limited to 80 items with footer hint to type for full search
- Debounced keyup handler (120ms) prevents re-render on every keystroke
- Removed auto-build of full list on page load

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove Deno, pass --extractor-args directly to yt-dlp

Remove the Deno installation step from stream.yml — yt-dlp uses its
built-in jsinterp for n-sig decryption and does not need Deno.
Also removes the yt-dlp config file that was creating the extractor-args
via the Deno step.

Pass --extractor-args youtube:player_client=ios directly in main.js
so yt-dlp still requests iOS client formats (format 301) without
depending on an external Deno runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add deno pip package for production JS runtime and pytubefix fallback

Production server lacked a JavaScript runtime (deno/node) needed for
YouTube's nsig challenge solver. Install deno via pip (bundles the binary)
so no system-level install is needed. Also fix --js-runtimes flag syntax
(each runtime needs its own flag, not comma-separated) and add pytubefix
as a pure-Python fallback when yt-dlp fails.

chore: fix ruff lint compatibility between pre-commit pinned v0.1.6 and local v0.14

Move pytest/pytest_asyncio imports before sys.path.insert so E402 only
applies to kuzu_memory imports that genuinely need it. Add RUF100 to
per-file ignores for tests/* so newer ruff does not flag the noqa
comments that the older pinned pre-commit version still requires.

feat: Phase 2 Step 1 — backend additions (#9)

Add three new endpoints required by the React Native frontend:

- GET /api/v1/sessions/active — returns the in-progress session with
  full detail (sections, exercises, computed weights, logged sets), or
  404 with code "no_active_session" when none exists
- GET /api/v1/exercises/filters — returns allowed enum values for
  muscle_group, equipment, and tracking_type filter UIs
- workout_count added to GET /api/v1/programs list response, replacing
  the previous flat ProgramResponse with ProgramListItemResponse

Also adds NoActiveSessionError domain type (HTTP 404, code
"no_active_session") wired into respondError.

BDD acceptance tests added for both new endpoints.

commit.message:
Increase card image height by 30% (276px → 359px)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Transform static dashboard into full SaaS product

- Auth: Supabase sign up / sign in (auth.html) with Arabic UI, email
  confirmation handling, and post-login redirect logic
- Connect: WhatsApp QR onboarding (connect.html) via server-side Whapi
  proxy to avoid CORS; polls channel status every 5s until connected
- Dashboard: live dashboard (dashboard.html) pulling real data from
  Supabase with real-time subscriptions; replaces all hardcoded HTML
- Webhook: Vercel serverless function (api/webhook.js) receives Whapi
  message events, calculates SLA response times (30 min target), and
  stores messages / response_events / group stats in Supabase
- Channel API: server-side proxy (api/channel.js) for Whapi channel
  creation and QR polling
- Admin: protected admin dashboard (admin.html + api/admin.js) at /admin,
  gated by ADMIN_EMAIL env var; shows all clients, WhatsApp channel
  statuses, per-client detail panel with groups / team activity / SLA
- Schema: supabase-schema.sql with all tables, indexes, RLS policies,
  realtime publication, and auto-profile trigger
- Routing: vercel.json updated with clean URL routes for all pages and
  API endpoints

Add handson notebook: Scientific Plotting with Matplotlib

Introductory notebook covering matplotlib for physics plotting with
tips and tricks: line/scatter plots, LaTeX labels, error bars, log scales,
subplots, colormaps (viridis, RdBu for E&M), saving for publications,
twin axes, inset plots, and rcParams. All examples use physics systems.
Defaults: figsize=(6,4) for letter paper, 11pt fonts for publications.

commit.message:
Fix multiplayer move confirmation button not appearing

The Confirm button was hidden after making all moves because the
backgammon core sets dice=null when movesRemaining is exhausted.
The CenterControls wrapper condition `isMyTurn && dice` evaluated
to false, hiding both Undo and Confirm buttons. Fixed by also
showing the button area when canEndTurn is true (pendingConfirmation).
Also fixed the Z key undo shortcut which had the same dice!==null guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add allow_cycles configuration to permit loops in workflow graphs

The execution runner already has MAX_ITERATIONS (1000) safeguard against
infinite loops, so strict cycle detection can be relaxed for legitimate
patterns like approval threshold loop-backs.

commit.message:
fix(availability): check equipment conflicts when generating available slots

Equipment availability was only validated at booking creation time, causing
slots to appear available even when required equipment was already booked.
Now fetches equipment_bookings for the requested day and filters out
conflicting slots before returning them to the client.
